# OSS parity allowlist
#
# Files listed here are exempt from the OSS parity check (see
# .github/workflows/oss-parity-check.yml and docs/OSS-PARITY.md).
#
# The ONLY legitimate reason for code to reference license state is the
# license verifier itself — the small surface that decodes an EdDSA-signed
# license key and exposes its claims (seat count, expiry, customer id) for
# support + telemetry + SLA enforcement. It must NOT gate feature execution.
#
# Format: one repo-relative path per line. Blank lines and lines beginning
# with `#` are ignored.
#
# As of 2026-05-28 the verifier does not yet exist in this repo (it's planned
# to live in @onenomad/przm-access; see ADR-021). When/if a verifier or
# adjacent file is added here, append its path below and reference
# docs/OSS-PARITY.md in the PR description.
#
# Example (do not uncomment unless the file exists):
# packages/server/src/access/verify-license.ts
